cvooe1.0.description:
# Castlevania: Order of Ecclesia Archipelago Version 1.0 #
* Initial Release
## Base Game Changes ##
 - Areas are unlocked through Map items instead of finishing other areas
 - You start with a Magical Ticket and can use them infinitely
 - Wygol Village is always accessible
  - The exit tunnel of Large Cavern has been extended to not need slide.
  - Albus in Mystery Manor is now just a regular check and has no ties to the ending; your villager count has no bearing on it.
  - Some cutscenes have been removed for technical purposes
 - To trigger Barlowe's fight and acccess the castle;
    - You must enter his room with the 3 pieces of Dominus.
    - If your villager goal is not met, you will get the bad ending and be told how many total villagers you need
    - If your villager goal is not met, the ending will not trigger unless you have Glyph  Union to prevent softlocking.

## Known Issues ##
N/A
cvooe1.0.title: Castlevania: Order of Ecclesia Archipelago v1.0

cvooe1.0.1.description:
# Castlevania: Order of Ecclesia Archipelago Version 1.0.1 #
## New Settings ##
N/A
## Changes ##
* Gravedorcus now logically requires Lizard Tail to get past
* Glyph checks with Useful AP items now show them as useful items instead of chests
* The Tin Man chest in Minera Prison Island is now a check.
* Hard mode is now unlocked by default
## Fixes ##
* Fixed certain brown chest checks re-closing the chest when leaving and coming back
* Fixed Fulgur being generatable as a filler glyph
* Fixed Kalidus Channel - Ship Room Lower Left Chest still acting like a normal wooden chest instead of a regular chest
* Fixed the Boulder room glyph in Underground Labyrinth not being placed locally
* Fixed Nikolai being in a brown chest
## Known Issues ##
* None so Far
cvooe1.0.1.title: Castlevania: Order of Ecclesia Archipelago v1.0.1
